body.text:
{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032410034856A3CC36925A8460929E"}"},"total":1062},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7616580366854734654","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"最新战况来了家人们！有些宝宝因为我的评论看了这篇，现在我要说，当时只更100多章我的评论还是不够全面，哪里是都正常，这是真正的双强！太带感了，作者文笔太牛了，大女人就是要事业爱情双丰收！
和爱人一起打天下，你在前方征战，我在大本营坐镇调度，让你无后顾之忧，把彼此的后背交给对方，不是某一方一味的迁就保护，是真正的双强！互相成就，彼此相爱，宗老二性格的描写从一而终，只有这样的人才会喜欢上像宓之这样的女人并且真的信任这样自己的爱人，灵魂上的共鸣啊家人们。宓之，不必多说，作者大大是真的爱她笔下的女主（某些是真的打着爱女主的名号实则是爱楠，但本篇绝对不是），而且里面的每个人物描写无论男女老少都很好，更无论正派还是反派，局限于短剧太可惜了，值得一个大制作。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773376309,"group_id":"7546956076533419070","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"620595047304717"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7546956076533419070","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"796"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读20小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":71332,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7567383764337066814","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"搞不明白那些高分咋整的，真正的好书被埋没了，是太多小孩看小说了嘛？文笔好剧情好有拉扯，不比简单的诡异的双洁好多了！真的不错！好久没看到这么好看的bg了，女主脑子正常，男主也正常，清醒的沉沦就是带感！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761921285,"group_id":"7546956076533419070","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"别关注我家人们🥹，我就是个臭看文的啊啊啊，书柜XP大杂烩什么都有什么都往里面扔，经常左右脑互搏，看得了好文有逻辑的文，有时候还要看一些诡异的爽文，还有一些诡异的类型，真的不要关注我，我甚至不分类啊啊啊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N78dgoQdG10EokPQD+xdoDg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"620595047304717","user_name":"暖暖长安"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"620595047304717","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":24,"fan_ranklist_title":"小桃籽","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7546956076533419070","book_info":{"abstract":"带子风流俏寡妇✖️内敛枭雄开国皇帝
娄宓之天生是个不懂何为认命的女人，想要的东西从来只凭本事去拿，哪怕是抢也要抢来。
前头夫君短命无福，婆家想把她连人带儿一把大火扬成灰？啊呸，我可去你的吧！
藏私产带子脱离亡夫一家，乱世之下没有庇护？无妨，她自己找。
入王府做工√
成为王妃身边的二等丫鬟√
庇护要有，富贵要谋。
宓之终将目光投向王府实际最高话事人，那位被百姓称作土皇帝的大都督。
王朝末年，乱世之下，潜龙在渊，只待一飞冲天。
没人会想到一个被用来分宠的二嫁寡妇竟能盛宠不衰几十年，从宠妾到宠妃，乃至后来被史书所记的干乱朝政。
一个放手纵容，一个攀龙成凤。
柔顺忍让？那最多是初时蛰伏，做小伏低的事跟她有什么相干？德不配位？呵，那更是笑话。
拜托，她都干政了，干政能是什么好词？所以啊，她是妖妃~
小剧场：
前期：
宓之：（只是笑笑）
宗凛：（皱眉）娄氏，你要敬顺夫人安分守己，不得胡乱争宠。
后期：
宓之：宗凛，她们都欺负我啊~
宗凛：（还是皱眉）好好好，不哭不哭，帮你欺负回去。
前期：
宓之：想念儿子～
宗凛：呵，要我养别人的儿子你想都别想。
后期：
宗凛：把儿子接到府上，算不算哄你？你可高兴？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b7a39c932eb3fa51bdbbd4d6d7c192d1","author":"咔叽黄桃","author_id":"","book_id":"7546956076533419070","book_name":"娄氏！不得胡乱争宠！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0f0e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":30,"name":"宠妻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=30&name=宠妻&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":28,"name":"萌宝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=28&name=萌宝&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":847,"name":"养崽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=847&name=养崽&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":877,"name":"古色古香","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=877&name=古色古香&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7546956235237507646","read_count":"58061","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"813205"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"395","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,萌宝,宠妻,养崽,古色古香","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/196a417e592a6d701fa66c1ed0949ce9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779501828&x-signature=tJ0qJTWnsvbIelvETJag2geQucY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3879556935061035","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"163"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032410034856A3CC36925A8460929E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":176,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18557,"reply_count":16,"show_pv":85263},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7568688092300067646","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"仙品，快更！！！说实话很磕男主和衡哥儿的养父情，虽然是爱他母亲养他长大，但也是真对他好，一种别样的父子情，突然脑海里就出现一段剧情，老年的男主一时不慎被以前宠爱的大儿子下毒造反，衡哥儿持刀在男主病床前对上大儿子，太有感觉了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762225261,"group_id":"7546956076533419070","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3hnURRyZJzLJdlhEG2Ma/xTBHQgLAeNwwTi2c3oApO/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/00620ab801ce474b9b05d97cb47f29cd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881915&x-signature=nAwHMZ1N%2FDWA9nv97RHAewnKjOg%3D","user_id":"2670073552308830","user_name":"樱桃小胖子x"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2670073552308830","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1725924490,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_titl listen_duration":3425,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24626,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":75317},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7574082984218673944","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第一次看到带子二嫁的文，好看的要死，剧情不拖泥带水，男女主都有脑子、非常聪明并且女主超级清醒，简介小剧场内容已经更新到了，平时相处和互动很自然，宓之（女主）说话超大胆，饭也是香香的，嘿嘿嘿
追平之后把作者另一本完结书看完了，那边九哥明目张胆的偏爱固然爽，这边二爷（男主）清醒的沉沦更是爽上加爽。
男主最初还说“娄氏，不可争宠”，后面自己动不动就吃前夫哥的醋，最近就有：
“宗凛吃着菜，默默想着，好像不知道在哪听人说起过，说孩子跟谁待久了就像谁。
他沉默着把目光放到衡哥儿身上。
那迟早有一日，崔衡也能像他。
死人就是死人，既然死了那自然什么都保不住。”
(第一次这样写书评，虽然看的书很多，但是高考作文之后我再也没自己写过一段话，这本我以为打分的时候写了书评，今天才发现没写，回来补上)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763482151,"group_id":"7546956076533419070","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8ne0qgX0kXsWNGvfGYLXdI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/468b42fa3785404bbc331fb312784ea3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879242&x-signature=RmWFNtTYUJ7mWu0VmAapwequmEk%3D","user_id":"941596394651917","user_name":"卧蝶✨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"941596394651917","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7546956076533419070","book_info":{"abstract":"带子风流俏寡妇✖️内敛枭雄开国皇帝
